markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Cubs wins by more than 4.5 runs in the Toronto vs Chicago C professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026 at 2:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Cubs wins by over 4.5 runs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tim Ream records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Tim Ream: 1+ assists?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Weston McKennie records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Australia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: Weston McKennie: First Goalscorer
